历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 70989; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shaanxi is 78 students in 2025 and remains 78 in 2026, with no expansion or reduction signals, and competitive pressure mainly comes from demand-side changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, a comprehensive public undergraduate institution; its Soft Science main ranking is approximately 195th (2025), with a slight downward trend from 189→192→195 in recent years, but still within the top 200 nationally; the university ranks 30th in Douyin platform popularity, rated as "relatively hot", with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.38 million, short video exposure mainly with tags like "the highest university in the world", attracting high attention; the reputation file has no negative public opinion records for this university, and the abnormal filing file also has no records of gaps in enrollment, overall public opinion is stable; fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors include popular directions such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Communication Engineering, etc., with related major categories being relatively hot in society; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; 2026; Tibet University is located in Lhasa, with a remote geographical location, posing some regional distance resistance for Shaanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 70989, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees, and the increased attention from relatively hot Douyin popularity, it is expected that competition in 2026 will intensify compared to 2025, with rankings shifting backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 73489, with a range of 72989-73989.
